outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed near-term from positive 0DTE GEX. Risk of amplification if spot drops toward monthly negative GEX zone.
outlook.summary: Spot at gamma flip equilibrium. Heavy put positioning across expirations indicates hedging, but positive short-term GEX stabilizes prices. Range-bound likely between 6500-6700 unless 6600 breaks decisively.

levels.motivazione: Critical pivot at spot. Gamma regime shift where dealer hedging behavior inverts. High probability of directional move on break.
MM target zone with confluence across 0DTE and WEEKLY expirations. Natural price attraction point minimizing option values.
Extreme volume/OI ratio (5.57x) signals institutional repositioning. Unusual activity suggests fresh hedging or directional bet.
RESONANCE across all three expirations. Dominant put wall in WEEKLY and MONTHLY with highest OI. Structural floor for market.
Major call resistance with 10,688 OI in 0DTE. Primary short-term cap on upside movement near spot.
CONFLUENCE in 0DTE+WEEKLY. Top call OI in weekly expiration. Major structural resistance limiting upside.

market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are temporary resistance (breakout likely). Put walls are strong support. Gamma flip acts as dynamic support.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility regime. Positive GEX across all expiries suppresses movement. Dealers long gamma providing stability.
outlook.summary: Spot trapped between 24100 CALL WALL and monthly gamma flip. Triple PUT resonance at 23500 anchors support. Reverse smirk in 0DTE suggests bullish bias but capped by heavy call resistance. Range-bound behavior expected.

levels.motivazione: Triple expiry PUT resonance (0DTE 379, WEEKLY 30, MONTHLY 259 OI). Multi-expiry dealer protection creates structural support floor.
Massive 4033 OI in Monthly expiration. Primary resistance with dealers short calls hedging by selling into rallies.
Triple expiry CALL resonance (0DTE 196, WEEKLY 213, MONTHLY 407 OI). Converging dealer short gamma zone creates secondary ceiling.
0DTE Max Pain within 0.1% of spot. Strong magnetic attraction as dealers target maximal option value destruction at expiration.
Monthly gamma flip at spot. Critical equilibrium where cumulative GEX shifts sign and dealer hedging behavior inverts.
Deep structural floor with triple expiry PUT resonance (0DTE 104, WEEKLY 40, MONTHLY 1007 OI). Ultimate crash protection level.
Dual expiry CALL confluence (0DTE 71, MONTHLY 325 OI). Secondary resistance cluster above primary wall.
Unusual 545 OI CALL concentration below spot in Weekly. Potential hedging zone indicating pullback target or support test.
